**Millionaire Dollar Mechanisms**  
**There are 3 parts to every great mechanism, but only one part is likely to move the needle exponentially. Here’s how to figure out which one that is...** 

**Quick, Actionable Takeaways You Will Have:** 

* Understand the 3 parts of great mechanisms and if you’re missing any of them  
* See why you usually go deep on ONE of the THREE parts and how this looks  
* How to determine  which area of your mechanism to emphasize   
* Know if you’re currently doing too much or too little on an area of your mechanism (this could be why a promo is not working)   
* Come up with powerful new test variations based on rewriting areas of your mechanism 

**Step 1: Begin Researching 3 Parts of Mechanism (More Below)** 

1. *Root Cause Element \-  “The Real Problem”*  
2. *Science/Conceptual Element \-  “How Solution Works”*  
3. *Delivery/Tangible Element \-  “Action That Delivers Benefit”*

What I’ve personally seen over and over (and my friend Fran has tested, so he deserves credit for this) — is that on any given promo, ONE of these areas is going to be emphasized much more than others. 

There are exceptions, but in general, it seems like the prospect only has so much psychological bandwidth for your mechanism — and if you go deep into all three areas, it can be too much to process and take action. 

So how do you determine which one to emphasize? 

Usually, it comes down to the level of sophistication of your market. 

**Step 2: Define Your Market’s Level of Sophistication**  
![][image1]

Often the dilemma will be whether your market is in the third, fourth, or fifth stage. 

**3rd Stage \==\> *Focus on Science/Conceptual Element \-  “How Solution Works”***

Cell phones are an example. Watch an Apple Keynote — they focus a lot on the breakthrough chip design and how it enables faster speeds and performance, better pictures, etc. 

**4th Stage \==\> *Focus Delivery/Tangible Element \-  “Action That Delivers Benefit”***

Infomercials for household solutions are great 4th stage examples. 

They focus mostly on the innovation and tangible element — how much better the mechanism is — the product in action and what it does.  Much of it is just pure demonstration. 

Much of fitness falls into this category. 

**5th Stage \==\> *Root Cause Element \-  “The Real Problem”***

Weight loss is often the best example. As Schwartz says: 

“The emphasis shifts from the promise and the mechanism which accomplishes it, to identification with the prospect himself. You are dealing here with the problem of bringing your prospect into your ad—not through desire—but through identification.”

Resurge is one of the greatest examples ever. It’s a weight loss promo that did $100M in sales, by reframing the root cause of obesity to lack of deep sleep. “Shallow sleep syndrome” was the root cause and “metabolic regeneration” is the mechanism. 

**Step 3: Describe the *Redefined* Root Cause of the Problem (“Why Nothing Works”)** 

***Capture what they THINK is their most painful problem***

- Your research has made it clear THIS is their \#1 pain/problem   
- You’ve cross-referenced sources (surveys, forums, live prospects) to confirm   
- You’ve made sure this problem is directly solvable by your product or service   
- You’ve languaged their problem in a way that they immediately identify with   
- You’ve quickly planted the seed that this isn’t their real problem 

***Explain away blame (“it’s not your fault”) while creating/reinforcing enemy***

- You’ve shown how they’ve been lied to by experts or mainstream solutions   
- You’ve removed guilt and shame for their pain by showing that they’re not alone   
- You’ve used the fact that experts/authorities don’t tell them this to reinforce your own credibility 

***Tie discovery of real root cause to hero’s journey***

- Your story captures emotions they experience while struggling with this problem   
- Your story takes them on a hero’s journey to discover the real root cause   
- Your story lands at a believable discovery of new/real root cause \+ credibility   
- Your story creates powerful aha/insight about why they failed/why this is real cause   
- Your story makes them eager to know what is next, i.e. the mechanism/solution 

***Not only makes logical/scientific sense — but also help explain away or “reframe” past failures***

- Your real root cause is scientifically backed or supported by a strong proof element  
- Your real root cause is explained in a way that is logically undeniable   
- Your real root cause is so compelling, they immediately “get” why nothing worked   
- Your real root cause is so easy to understand, they can easily restate to a friend   
- Your real root cause gives them the feeling they don’t have to suffer any longer 

***Tie your real root cause discovery to one of your most powerful proof/credibility elements***

- Use studies, testimonials, a case history, or another of your very strongest proof elements to prove your root cause

**Step 4: Describe the Core Mechanism of Action (“How Solution Works”)** 

***Should be a direct, undeniable extension of your real root cause discovery***

- How logical is the flow between your root cause discovery and your mechanism?  
- Do you have proof that fixing your root cause is only possible with your mechanism? 

***Is this really a breakthrough and made to feel new?***

- Is it something few people (or no one else) has legitimately heard of before?   
- Have you explained why nobody has heard of this or why it’s been suppressed?   
- Have you added elements of specificity to show exactly what makes it so different?   
- Do you have 3rd party evidence it’s newsworthy, historic, or a legit breakthrough?   
- Or if it’s not new, can you explain why it’s newly reintroduced or rediscovered? 

***Does your mechanism feel scientific, logical, and/or easily provable via demonstration?*** 

- Have you leveraged science or “method” to reinforce your mechanism?    
- Have you logically explained your mechanism and how it works   
- Have you used a demonstration or “show it in action” copy?   
- Have you tied your mechanism to one of your most powerful 3rd party proof/credibility elements?   
- Does your mechanism have a “holy shit that’s so true\!” feeling? 

***To what degree have you made your mechanism easy to understand?*** 

- Have you taken the complexity of your mechanism put it in simple language?   
- Have you used metaphor to simplify make it easier to understand?   
- Have you created a new phrase or language for your mechanism?   
- Does your new phrase or description make it easy to repeat to others?   
- Does your mechanism leave them with the feeling that, no matter what, they learned something new? 

**Step 5: Describe the Mechanism of Delivery “Tangible” Part (“Innovation for Faster/Easier Results”)**

***Have you developed a way for your prospect to experience the benefits of your mechanism more rapidly?*** 

- Depending on your niche this can be a system, software, a pill,  technology, drill/workout   
- Is this method of delivery new/novel, or can it be positioned as that 

***Is this method of delivery not only fast — but so easy it’s foolproof?*** 

- Have you walked them through and dimensionalized just how easy it is?   
- Have you proven how easy it is with demonstration or case study or research 

***Is there a powerful technical innovation behind your delivery mechanism that explains why it delivers faster results?*** 

- Can you point to new technology, patents, or clear innovation others don’t have   
- Can you explain the science behind your delivery innovation as another proof point 

***Have you leveraged the ease, proof, and speed of this delivery mechanism to overcome objections?***

- Have you summarized the main objections and used this easy/fast delivery to explain why it will work for them no matter what   
- Have you provided proof that those with the same objections got results using this mechanism/delivery 

**Step 6: Pick Which of 3 Parts of the Mechanism Framework You Will Highlight Most**

Based on your initial research and the prospect’s level of awareness, decide which element you will focus on most. 

This is part of the art of it. You may have to test pitch or test market to prospects with each element showcased more, and see if there’s a difference in response. 

It also depends on the strength of what you have. If you have a shocking/radically different and compelling root cause — like resurge did (lack of deep sleep is the real cause of weight gain) — then you may want to focus on that. 

If you have a huge scientific breakthrough your product is based on, you may choose to showcase the second element most. 

And if you have a highly innovative product that delivers the benefits, you might choose the 3rd. 

The point is, you usually will want to zoom in on one of the three and de-emphasize the other two. Not eliminate them, but simplify and de-emphasize. 

**Step 7: Write \+ Connect the Rest of the Copy Elements** 

* The mechanism is usually the hardest part of the copy to complete   
* It often can help you generate a big idea or core theme of your promo \- often it IS the big idea  
* Once you’ve gone from root cause (including nightmare/discovery story) to breakthrough/solution to tangible method of delivery, the rest of the copy is more formulaic  
* Add headline and lead — and then go from tangible part of mechanism to product intro, product overview, offer, guarantee, and close — and you’re done with sales letter  
* Starting with this makes the entire part of the copywriting process 10 times easier

---

**Magnesium Breakthrough \- Over $20 Million In Sales \-**   
**Not Perfect Copy But... Does Fairly Well On Mechanism Score**

[https://magnesiumbreakthrough.com/](https://magnesiumbreakthrough.com/) 

***3rd Stage Sophistication*** 

Part 1 \- Stress is greatly worsened by mag deficiency. This is the real root cause of most health problems, from weight to sleep and early death. 

**Part 2  \- Most people don’t enough of even 1 or 2 forms of magnesium. But there are 7 forms your body actually needs.  Getting all 7 forms of magnesium is the only way to reverse deficiency and absolutely necessary.** 

Part 3 \- We’ve developed a unique encapsulation method that allows us to get optimal amounts of all 7 forms of magnesium — into one small capsule. Plus, we added monoatomic magnesium not available in any other product — which helps make it more bioavailable. 

---

**The X Pattern \- Tens of Millions In Sales \-**   
**One of My All-Time Favorite Mechanisms**

[https://web.archive.org/web/20150314222046/http://moneymappress.com/category/trading-services/high-velocity-profits/](https://web.archive.org/web/20150314222046/http://moneymappress.com/category/trading-services/high-velocity-profits/) 

***Between 3rd and 4th Stage Sophistication*** 

Part 1: You’re missing out on sky-high returns by failing to buy and sell at the right times.

Part 2: “The X Pattern” – A mysterious X-pattern appears in graphs alongside historic windfalls – and if you can spot it and buy the stock at the first X and then sell at the second X – you’ll become wealthier than you ever dreamed possible.

![][image2]

Part 3 \- “The F-Score” – The filter for delivering recommendations. F-Score is an incredibly precise metric for uncovering public companies whose share prices are susceptible to enormous profit spikes. It compares a company's current financial health to where it was the previous year by assigning one point for each of the “nine financial milestones”.

Then, the promo boils down the process/delivery into 3 easy steps:

Step 1: Identify those stocks that register an eight caliber or greater F-Score.

Step 2: Buy these stocks when the first X pattern appears.

Step 3: Sell these same stocks when it appears again.

---

**Hidden Power Plane w/Nick Faldo**  
[https://www.performancegolfzone.com/power-plane-masterclass](https://www.performancegolfzone.com/power-plane-masterclass/store/info?inf_custom_vcid=b8deca62ff7ef0119cc9a444a86994a6-16795-0309&inf_custom_GaSource=&inf_field_Email=&inf_field_Firstname=&inf_field_Lastname=&inf_field_Phone1=&inf_custom_EmailSubject=&inf_custom_EmailFrom=&inf_custom_EmailCreative=&he=&el=direct)

***4th Stage Sophistication*** 

**Part 1:** Amateur golfers fail to gain distance (and often lose distance as they age) because they’re trying to focus on dozens of mechanical adjustments to their arms, shaft, and clubhead, which I’ve seen can take many years and thousands of balls to master. It’s like trying to drive a car down the highway with NO motor.

**Part 2: “THE HIDDEN POWER PLANE”** There’s ONE important thing that determines how your arms, shaft, and clubhead return to the ball for maximum distance. And that’s the way your BODY presets power — on the “hidden power plane”.  When you pre-set your body correctly at the beginning of your swing, you instantly sync your quads… core… arms… and shoulders so your club goes perfectly on-plane — it’s invisible to the naked eye. Powerful way to load your body, arms, shaft, and clubhead into the right position for perfect contact.

![][image3] ![][image4]

**Part 3:** I’m going to get you into the hidden power plane by using this simple *60-second Power Plane Drill* that returns your club through the impact zone — with the least amount of moving effort. While traditional swing plane training can be effective, they require you to focus on your arms, shaft, and path individually to stay on the right plane – but this is different. 

Because The 60-Second Power Plane Drill simplifies the swing… getting your body into its most natural position for maximum distance… 

Which means there are far fewer moving parts to the swing… This makes it a simpler, more repeatable technique for you… This also means your body can naturally stabilize… …and allow your bigger golf muscles to fire and explode through the impact zone.
